details.test: Task 1: Schedule one-time electricity bill payment from Everyday Checking
Task 2: Set up 6-month monthly transfer from Everyday Checking to Holiday Savings
Task 3: Tag largest transaction over $200 in last 60 days as business expense
Task 4: Create Vacation 2025 sub-account and weekly Monday transfers
Task 5: Redeem 5,000 points as statement credit to highest APR card
Task 6: Order replacement debit card with lowest replacement fee
Task 7: Create low-balance and large-withdrawal alerts for Everyday Checking
Task 8: Create Restaurants budget and recategorize three uncategorized transactions
Task 9: Apply for personal loan and select appropriate offer
Task 10: Enroll Everyday Checking in e-statements and open last three statements
